JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK; BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR JURY TRIAL, MICHAEL ROSSOFF APPEARING FOR PLTF, ARNOLD ELLIS APPEARING FOR DEFT. (9:30AM) CASE SETTLED PENDING TWO CONTINGENCIES: 1. A DATE THAT DEFT. WILL ENTER A DE TOX PROGRAM WILL BE PROVIDED TO THE COURT NO LATER THAN 5/16/95, AT 5PM. 2. DEFT. WILL PERMANANTLY SURRENDER ONE OF TWO UNITS HE HOLDS POSSESSION OF; AFTER MR. ELLIS AND DEFT. COMPARE THEIR COMPARBLE WORTH AND AGREE ON WHICH ONE TO SURRENDER THE SUMMARY JUDGMENT THAT WAS UNDER SUBMISSION IN DEPT. #2 IS MOOT DUE TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLTF. WILL SUBMIT A MODIFIED STIPULATION THAT WILL BE FILED BY THE COURT. MR. ROSSOFF SUBMITTED A COPY OF THE STIPULATION AND IT WAS RECEIVED BY THE COURT BUT NOT FILED.
